content.storyText: Ayaan read a short sentence: "The sun is bright." He smiled when he could sound out each word. With practice, he read another sentence and understood both.
content.activityInstructions: Read three simple sentences aloud and circle words with the same beginning sound.
content.worksheetExample: Match picture to sentence and fill one missing word.
content.parentTip: Read daily for 10 minutes and celebrate each correct word.

content.storyText: Mina used beads to show that 2 and 3 make 5. She tried more pairs and noticed patterns in numbers.
content.activityInstructions: Use counters to make 5 and 10 in different ways.
content.quizConcept: Counting, number bonds, and early pattern recognition.
content.worksheetExample: Fill missing numbers in simple number bond circles.
content.parentTip: Use snacks and toys for hands-on counting practice.

content.storyText: Sami sorted objects into two boxes: living and non-living. He explained why a plant is living and a toy is non-living.
content.activityInstructions: Sort 10 household items into living/non-living groups and explain one reason for each.
content.worksheetExample: Circle living things and cross non-living things.
content.parentTip: Ask your child to explain 'why' after each choice.

content.storyText: Lina drew a map from her home to school and marked important places.
content.activityInstructions: Draw a simple path map and label home, school, and one landmark.
content.quizConcept: Place awareness and basic map thinking.
content.worksheetExample: Match symbols to places on a tiny map.
content.parentTip: Use walks to identify landmarks and directions.

content.storyText: Omar saw old and new photos of his family and noticed changes over time.
content.activityInstructions: Compare one old object/photo with a new one and tell two differences.
content.quizConcept: Understanding time change in simple contexts.
content.worksheetExample: Paste or draw 'old' and 'new' items in two columns.
content.parentTip: Share family stories to build time awareness.

content.storyText: Hiba learned to ask an adult before opening new apps and to keep personal details private.
content.activityInstructions: List three device safety rules and role-play one safe decision.
content.quizConcept: Basic digital safety and guided tech use.
content.worksheetExample: Tick safe actions and cross unsafe actions.
content.parentTip: Use shared screen time and discuss online safety often.

content.storyText: Rayan made a 'My Strengths' card and felt proud sharing what he can do well.
content.activityInstructions: Write or draw one strength and one goal for this week.
content.worksheetExample: Complete 'I can...' and 'I am learning...' prompts.
content.parentTip: Praise effort and progress, not just results.

content.storyText: Sara felt upset when her toy broke. She took deep breaths and asked for help calmly.
content.activityInstructions: Identify feeling faces and choose one calm strategy for each.
content.parentTip: Model calm responses during small setbacks.

content.storyText: Bilal stayed active after eating healthy food and washing hands before meals.
content.activityInstructions: Create a simple healthy plate and hygiene checklist.
content.quizConcept: Daily health routines and prevention basics.
content.parentTip: Keep routines consistent and visible with a chart.

content.storyText: Areeba learned to choose needs first, then save for wants.
content.activityInstructions: Classify 8 items into needs and wants.
content.parentTip: Use pocket money to teach simple choices.

content.storyText: Zayd told the truth about a mistake and helped fix it kindly.
content.activityInstructions: Discuss one honesty scenario and one kindness action for the day.
content.quizConcept: Core Islamic values in daily life.
content.worksheetExample: Choose honest and kind actions from scenarios.
